jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at NSDC
jsonLd.description:
Join the NSDC family as a Instructional Designer in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NSDC:
NSDC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDC!
